content.text:

compatible: yes
decision: apply
compatibility_reason: The changed command and skill are git-branch naming workflows with no host-specific runtime assumptions, so they fit this coding-focused desktop host.
findings:

    file: /Users/HanHu/.cursor/commands/checkout-for-huh8.md
    reason: Content is host-agnostic and only depends on standard git CLI behavior.
  - severity: low
